title: Warehouse Management
author: JSL EKOS
description: This module explains warehouse operations in stainless steel manufacturing, including material receiving, storage, inventory management, material handling, and dispatch preparation.
learningObjectives: Understand the role of the warehouse in manufacturing.
Learn warehouse receiving and storage procedures.
Identify warehouse equipment and material handling methods.
Recognize warehouse safety and quality practices.

content.introduction: The warehouse acts as the central storage and distribution point for raw materials, semi-finished products, finished goods, consumables, and spare parts. Efficient warehouse operations ensure uninterrupted production and timely customer deliveries.
content.purpose: The primary objective of warehouse management is to store materials safely, maintain accurate inventory records, and ensure the right material reaches the right location at the right time.
processSteps: Issue material as per production requirement.
content.summary: Warehouse management plays an important role in supporting manufacturing by ensuring proper storage, inventory control, material availability, and efficient movement of goods throughout the production process.
